question_text: How should the surface area of a composite solid be found?
option_a: Add the exposed surface areas and exclude any internal faces that are joined
option_b: Add every face, including hidden internal faces
option_c: Use the volume formula for the largest solid only
option_d: Multiply the total height by the total width
explanation: Internal faces are not part of the outside surface of the composite solid.
